mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_NUMBER AS userNumber, U.USER_ID AS userId, U.USER_NAME AS userName, U.USER_PHONE AS userPhone, M.MEMBER_DOB AS memberDob, M.MEMBER_GENDER AS memberGender, M.JOB_NUMBER AS jobNumber, J.JOB_NAME AS jobName, JR.JOB_RESULT_CONFIRM_DATE AS jobConfirmDate FROM TBL_USER U JOIN TBL_MEMBER M ON U.USER_NUMBER = M.USER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_GROUP J ON M.JOB_NUMBER = J.JOB_NUMBER LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_NUMBER, JOB_RESULT_CONFIRM_DATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY USER_NUMBER ORDER BY JOB_RESULT_CONFIRM_DATE DESC NULLS LAST, JOB_RESULT_NUMBER DESC ) AS RN FROM TBL_JOB_RESULT WHERE JOB_RESULT_STATUS = '판정완료' ) JR ON M.USER_NUMBER = JR.USER_NUMBER AND JR.RN = 1 WHERE U.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber}

SELECT P.POST_NUMBER AS postNumber, P.POST_TITLE AS postTitle, C.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, U.USER_ID AS userId, P.POST_DATE AS postDate, P.ANSWER_STATUS AS answerStatus FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_USER U ON P.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE P.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} AND P.POST_TYPE = 'QNA_POST' ORDER BY P.POST_NUMBER DESC

SELECT U.USER_NUMBER AS userNumber, U.USER_ID AS userId, U.USER_NAME AS userName, U.USER_PHONE AS userPhone, C.COMPANY_NUMBER AS companyNumber, C.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, C.COMPANY_BRN AS companyBrn, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS AS companyAddress, C.COMPANY_STATE AS companyState, CM.COMPANY_MANAGER_STATE AS companyManagerState FROM TBL_USER U JOIN TBL_COMPANY_MEMBER CM ON U.USER_NUMBER = CM.USER_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON CM.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE U.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber}

SELECT P.POST_NUMBER AS postNumber, P.POST_TITLE AS postTitle, C.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, U.USER_ID AS userId, P.POST_DATE AS postDate, P.ANSWER_STATUS AS answerStatus FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_USER U ON P.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY_MEMBER CM ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CM.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_TYPE = 'QNA_POST' AND P.ANSWER_STATUS = '답변대기' AND CM.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} AND CM.COMPANY_MANAGER_STATE = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY P.POST_DATE DESC, P.POST_NUMBER DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMP_INFO WHERE COMPANY_NUMBER = #{companyNumber}

SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER AS companyNumber, C.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS AS companyAddress, C.COMPANY_STATE AS companyState, C.COMPANY_BRN AS companyBrn, F.FILE_PATH AS filePath, CI.COMP_CEO_NAME AS compCeoName, CI.COMP_FND_YEAR AS compFndYear, CI.COMP_EMPL_CNT AS compEmplCnt, CI.COMP_REV AS compRev, CI.COMP_CAP AS compCap, CI.COMP_TYPE AS compType, CI.COMP_SUMMARY AS compSummary, CI.COMP_TECH AS compTech, CI.COMP_MAIN_BIZ AS compMainBiz, CI.COMP_INFO AS compInfo, CI.COMP_SVC_HIST AS compSvcHist, JP.JOB_POST_PROFILE AS jobPostProfile, JP.JOB_POST_CONTENT AS jobPostContent, JP.JOB_POST_PROCESS AS jobPostProcess, JP.JOB_POST_METHOD AS jobPostMethod, JP.JOB_POST_DATE AS jobPostDate, JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING AS cat1IsHiring, JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING AS cat2IsHiring, JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING AS cat3IsHiring, JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING AS cat4IsHiring FROM TBL_COMPANY C JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = F.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON CI.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE C.COMPANY_NUMBER = #{companyNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMP_INFO ( COMPANY_NUMBER, COMP_CEO_NAME, COMP_FND_YEAR, COMP_EMPL_CNT, COMP_REV, COMP_CAP, COMP_TYPE, COMP_SUMMARY, COMP_TECH, COMP_MAIN_BIZ, COMP_INFO, COMP_SVC_HIST, COMP_PAGE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{companyNumber}, #{compCeoName}, #{compFndYear}, #{compEmplCnt}, #{compRev}, #{compCap}, #{compType}, #{compSummary}, #{compTech}, #{compMainBiz}, #{compInfo}, #{compSvcHist}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO TBL_JOB_POST ( COMPANY_NUMBER, JOB_POST_PROFILE, JOB_POST_CONTENT, JOB_POST_PROCESS, JOB_POST_METHOD, JOB_POST_DATE, CAT1_IS_HIRING, CAT2_IS_HIRING, CAT3_IS_HIRING, CAT4_IS_HIRING ) VALUES ( #{companyNumber}, #{jobPostProfile}, #{jobPostContent}, #{jobPostProcess}, #{jobPostMethod}, SYSDATE, #{cat1IsHiring}, #{cat2IsHiring}, #{cat3IsHiring}, #{cat4IsHiring} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_COMP_INFO SET COMP_CEO_NAME = #{compCeoName}, COMP_FND_YEAR = #{compFndYear}, COMP_EMPL_CNT = #{compEmplCnt}, COMP_REV = #{compRev}, COMP_CAP = #{compCap}, COMP_TYPE = #{compType}, COMP_SUMMARY = #{compSummary}, COMP_TECH = #{compTech}, COMP_MAIN_BIZ = #{compMainBiz}, COMP_INFO = #{compInfo}, COMP_SVC_HIST = #{compSvcHist}, COMP_PAGE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE COMPANY_NUMBER = #{companyNumber}

UPDATE TBL_JOB_POST SET JOB_POST_PROFILE = #{jobPostProfile}, JOB_POST_CONTENT = #{jobPostContent}, JOB_POST_PROCESS = #{jobPostProcess}, JOB_POST_METHOD = #{jobPostMethod}, JOB_POST_DATE = SYSDATE, CAT1_IS_HIRING = #{cat1IsHiring}, CAT2_IS_HIRING = #{cat2IsHiring}, CAT3_IS_HIRING = #{cat3IsHiring}, CAT4_IS_HIRING = #{cat4IsHiring} WHERE COMPANY_NUMBER = #{companyNumber}
